description: Full-time birthday girl, part-time coder, all-time romantic. Currently accepting birthday wishes, cake recommendations, and love letters in code.
Specializes in consuming birthday cakes at alarming speeds while simultaneously reviewing pull requests. Has never met a cake she didn't like.
Writes love letters in JavaScript and sends them via API calls. Her commit messages are poetry, and her code reviews come with heart emojis.
Responsible for maintaining team morale through strategic meme deployment. Has a 100% success rate in making people laugh during standup meetings.
For one magical day, Anwesha has the power to grant birthday wishes. Terms and conditions apply. Side effects may include excessive happiness.
Debugs code by day, debugs hearts by night. Her error messages are surprisingly romantic, and her stack traces always lead back to love.
Reigns supreme over this portfolio with grace, humor, and an impressive CSS game. Long may she code!
